description_long: This is a military-style fixed-wing airplane with a straight, high-mounted wing configuration and twin turbofan engines mounted on pylons above the rear fuselage. The fuselage is robust and streamlined, with a forward-positioned, enclosed cockpit featuring a dark canopy. The tail section is distinctive, featuring a twin vertical stabilizer (H-tail) and a horizontal stabilizer connecting the two fins. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with a visible nose wheel and main gear under the wings. The exterior is finished in a light gray color, with minimal markings and a smooth, matte surface.
description: A gray, twin-engine military airplane with high straight wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-mounted straight wings, twin engines above the fuselage, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the twin engine nacelles, cockpit profile, and the H-tail configuration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the rear of the engine nacelles.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same features as the left, with clear visibility of the cockpit and engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turbofan engines mounted above the rear fuselage on pylons.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a single horizontal stabilizer connecting them.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with a single nose wheel and two main gear units under the wings.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy, likely single or tandem seat.
